# Size

**Data field**

The number of bytes in this data rate atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: The type of this atom.
- **Flags**: A 32-bit integer.
- **Data rate**: The required data rate in bits per second, expressed as a 32-bit integer.

items.description: The required data rate in bits per second, expressed as a 32-bit integer.
